content.en:
The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch didn't know that they had been hit by the Ten Thousand Void Life Technique, but they knew that the two of them couldn't kill Ye Tian, so they quickly retreated, lest Ye Tian's support arrive, then it would be difficult for them to escape.

Ye Tian didn't track them, after all, now that they were tracking, they would definitely be able to find someone tracking.

Anyway, they had been hit by the Myriad Void Life Technique, and it was easy for Ye Tian to find them.

After the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch left, Ye Tian looked in the direction where the two of them were leaving and muttered, "I thought it was an attack from the Dark God Society, but I didn't expect it to be an attack from the Heavenly Fire Sect. Could it be that the Heavenly Fire Sect is behind hiring the Dark God Guild Heavenly Monarch to attack me?"

Whether this guess was correct or not, there was no doubt that the Heavenly Fire Sect was his enemy.

He had also seen the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch from afar, the aura of the two of them was not what it was today, it was obvious that the soul aura had changed, if the others were here, they would not have been able to discover the identities of the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch at all.

It's a pity that they met Ye Tian and encountered a hanging man with a copying talent, who completely ignored their soul chaos treasure, directly understood the essence of their souls, and used the copying talent to check their identities.

"Heavenly Fire Sect, this is a force that has some contradictions with the Void Heaven One Vein, with a Dao Ancestor and multiple True Ancestors, it is also one of the big forces in the chaos, although it is far inferior to the Void Heaven One Bloodline, but in some territories, it is enough to compete with the Void Sky One Bloodline. Ye Tian thought about the situation of the Heavenly Fire Sect and muttered.

If the other party is a force that is friendly with the Void Heaven Sect, then today's attack by these two people may be a personal act, but the Heavenly Fire Sect has a contradiction with the Void Heaven Sect, and for Ye Tian, today's attack is the work of the Heavenly Fire Sect.

"Heavenly Fire Sect, you are looking for death!"

Ye Tian's killing intent boiled.

The Heavenly Fire Sect in the chaos is a behemoth, and he can't shake it at all, but the Heavenly Fire Sect in the Great Universe is not very powerful, except for the two Heavenly Monarchs at the end of the Heavenly Monarch List, the other Heavenly Monarchs are not very powerful.

If the Heavenly Fire Sect dared to assassinate him, he naturally dared to assassinate the Heavenly Fire Sect.

Besides, if he assassinates someone else, no one really wants to find out about him.

Without him, he would have a lot of chaotic supernatural powers and great supernatural powers, and many of them had not been exposed, and it was difficult for the Tianhuo Sect to know his identity by killing people with those chaotic supernatural powers.

"Don't be in a hurry to retaliate first, otherwise the Tianhuo Sect will be able to guess it, and after going back, you will retreat for a period of time, and then take revenge on the Tianhuo Sect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon after, he returned to the Void Heaven Hall and began a new round of retreat.

And the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch who returned to the Heavenly Fire Sect still showed an unbelievable expression, they couldn't imagine that Ye Tian was so rebellious against the sky, not long after stepping into the Heavenly Monarch, he had practiced the Blood River Immortal Technique, and the Great Immortal Technique and other great divine powers had actually cultivated to the extreme level.

In addition, Ye Tian's physique is also extremely amazing, and his recovery ability is terrifying.

The combined effect is that Ye Tian is almost immortal.

Sensing this, they didn't try to kill Ye Tian, because they couldn't kill it at all.

"What to do, the life-saving ability of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is too rebellious, just relying on those few magical powers, we can't help him, unless we use the Chaos Treasure that specializes in capturing people, with our strength, we can hope to trap him and take him away, but if he can't kill him, he can completely notify others, it will expose our existence, is it difficult to prepare to ban all the treasures of communication, the price paid is too great, and it may not be able to collect!"

"There's no way, give up the plan to assassinate Wanfa Daozi for the time being, and report the information about Wanfa Daozi, you can only do this!" White Eagle Heavenly Monarch said helplessly.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch nodded.

The two of them had already predicted that the future would definitely be difficult, and even the cultivation resources would be deducted a lot, and even after leaving the Great Universe in the future, that True Ancestor would probably punish them.

If they knew this, they wouldn't have targeted Ye Tian at all.

......

In a flash, 100,000 years have passed.

For such a long time, Ye Tian had almost spent all his points, and his resources had been almost spent, and he finally cultivated the eighth layer of the Xuanxu Jue to the Dacheng realm, and the Blood River Immortal Technique had also entered the Xiaocheng realm, and the prototype of the Great Dao had also walked 1,500 meters away.

That's how far he's been in 100,000 years!

"The strength has improved a lot, it is extremely close to the strength of the last Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, it is estimated that after cultivating for tens of thousands of years, you can officially enter the Heavenly Monarch List. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he didn't continue to retreat and cultivate, because once he continued to cultivate, he really entered the Heavenly Monarch List, and his strength would be completely exposed.

Now it's even better!

Moreover, he also needs to take revenge on the Heavenly Fire Sect, and it is necessary to hide his strength.

this day.

Ye Tian secretly left the Void Heaven Hall and headed to the territory where the Heavenly Fire Sect was located.

This territory is called the Heavenly Fire Domain by the Heavenly Fire Sect, and its area is equivalent to the size of thousands of star fields in the past, but in today's great universe, this area can only be regarded as a small territory.

And the territory ruled by the Void Heaven Temple was equivalent to the size of several small universes before.

There is no way, the Heavenly Fire Sect does not have the top powerhouse who can suppress the territory, and the strongest Heavenly Monarch is the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch, ranking 912th on the Heavenly Monarch List, the strength is too weak, how can he be qualified to occupy too much territory.

If it really competes with other top powers, the Heavenly Fire Sect will definitely suffer a lot.

Especially in today's era, assassinations and attacks are too normal, I don't know how many Heavenly Monarchs have fallen, and the Heavenly Fire Sect naturally does not dare to be arrogant.

Heavenly Fire Domain, the Hellfire Giant City.

Ye Tian sneaked here, and his target was the city lord of the Hellyan Giant City, the Hellyan Heavenly Monarch, who was at the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, was not weak, controlled a great divine power, and reached the Dacheng realm.

As for the Chaos Divine Power, it was not mastered.

Such a Heavenly Monarch is the most common Heavenly Monarch, and his strength exceeds that of an ordinary Heavenly Mandate Realm Peak Heavenly Monarch, but it is far inferior to the Heavenly Monarch List Heavenly Monarch, and is in the middle position.

But this level of Heavenly Monarch is the mainstay of a force, after all, the real Heavenly Monarch is a deterrent, and must sit in the headquarters, in case they all leave and are attacked by other forces, it will be completely troublesome.

Hell Flame Giant City, City Lord's Mansion.

The Prison Flame Heavenly Monarch was cultivating, and a sword light tore in, piercing through all the formations, piercing through the head of the Prison Flame Heavenly Monarch, and killing the other party.

Soon after.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch descended here, observed the surrounding situation, and frowned: "Chaos Divine Power - One Qi Piercing Yang Sword, ranked among the three thousand great divine powers, there are several Heavenly Monarchs who have practiced this Chaos Divine Power in the great universe, but those few people have no enmity with our Heavenly Fire Sect, why did they kill the Prison Flame Heavenly Monarch?"

At first, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch thought that this assassination was just an accident.

But in the days that followed, the Heavenly Monarchs under the command of the Heavenly Fire Sect were assassinated one by one, and there was no trace of the murderer.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch even deliberately set a trap, but they never encountered the unknown murderer.

Suddenly, the entire Heavenly Fire Sect fell into a panic.
